test_edge_destructuring: Pre-existing edge case in destructuring assignment lowering. Tracked as a non-blocking parity gap; fails on both v0.5.568 baseline and current.
test_edge_objects_records: Pre-existing edge case in object/record property access. Tracked as a non-blocking parity gap; fails on both v0.5.568 baseline and current.
test_gap_object_methods: Strict-mode property descriptor errors — perry doesn't throw TypeError on writes to non-writable properties (defineProperty / freeze / Object.preventExtensions paths). Pre-existing behavior gap; not a regression.
test_issue_422_socket_connect: Net test passes locally with echo server running, fails on Linux CI (no echo fixture server). Environmental.
test_net_min: Net test passes locally with echo server running, fails on Linux CI (no echo fixture server). Environmental.
test_net_socket: Net test passes locally with echo server running, fails on Linux CI (no echo fixture server). Environmental.
test_net_upgrade_tls: Net test needs a TLS-capable echo server fixture; not available on CI. Environmental.
test_sock_write_map: Net test passes locally with echo server running, fails on Linux CI (no echo fixture server). Environmental — issue #91 dispatch fix landed in v0.5.581.
test_issue_446_import_type_method_typeof: Pre-existing #446 path: type-only-import class metadata flow into imported_classes is wired but `typeof MethodCall` on the imported class returns 'object' on Linux CI vs 'function' on macOS. Platform-specific; not a regression. Tracked under #446.
